name: Entity Status
desc: Triggers a visual status effect for an entity (particle, sound, animation).
notes: Codes: 2=damage throb, 3=death smoke, 5=arrow hitting player, 6=wolf angry, 7=wolf tamed, 8=wolf shaking water, 9=eating, 10=sheep eating grass, 11=tnt ignite, 12=firework explode, 16=fishing hook.

implementation.overview: Entity status change (2=damage throb, 3=death). Modules: ESP, DamageIndicator, KillAura (hurt time tracking).
